title: i18n: 'PROJECTS' sidebar section header untranslated
description:
## Source

Discovered during ZAI-89 visual QA ‚ÄĒ see [ZAI-115](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-115) inbox-mine-ru.png. Out-of-scope for [ZAI-89](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-89) (which targeted SidebarAgents ‚ÄĒ the `Agents` heading was translated to `–ź–ď–ē–Ě–Ę–ę`; the parallel `Projects` heading was missed).

## Symptom

In the left sidebar under `ru` locale, the section header renders as `PROJECTS` (English, all-caps) while sibling sections (`–ź–ď–ē–Ě–Ę–ę`, `–ö–ě–ú–ü–ź–Ě–ė–Į`, `–†–ź–Ď–ě–Ę–ź`) are correctly translated.

## Reproduction

1. `pnpm -C ui dev`
2. Open any route under `/SDF/`, switch language to `ru`.
3. Inspect the sidebar ‚ÄĒ `PROJECTS` heading is the only English label.

## Suspected root cause

`SidebarProjects.tsx` (or equivalent) ‚ÄĒ the section heading is likely a literal `"Projects"` rendered through the `text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest` className that produces the all-caps English word. Mirror the fix from `SidebarAgents.tsx` (key `sidebar.agents_heading` ‚ÄĒ add `sidebar.projects_heading`).

## Acceptance

- `sidebar.projects_heading` key in `en`/`ru` `common.json`.
- Sidebar projects section header renders in Russian under `ru`.
- i18n-only diff per `scripts/check-i18n-only-diff.sh`.
- No DOM/feature changes.
